concept: Envision a platformer where you're a retired daredevil who can only walk on surfaces matching the color of your constantly changing jumpsuit. Time your movements precisely as your outfit cycles through a spectrum of colors, temporarily revealing new pathways while making others impassable. Collect fame tokens to unlock spectacular stunt moves that help overcome increasingly complex chromatic obstacle courses. Outperform younger rivals in the ultimate comeback tour across increasingly dangerous venues designed to test the limits of your color-coordination abilities.
